0.criterion_text: The teacher communicates clear expectations of student performance in line with the unit standards and competencies.

1.criterion_text: The teacher utilizes various learning materials, resources and strategies to enable all students to learn and achieve the unit standards and competencies and learning goals.

2.criterion_text: The teacher monitors and checks on students' learning and attainment of the unit standards and competencies by conducting varied forms of assessments during class discussion.

3.criterion_text: The teacher provides appropriate feedback or interventions to enable students in attaining the unit standards and competencies.

4.criterion_text: The teacher manages the classroom environment and time in a way that supports student learning and the achievement of the unit standards and competencies.

5.criterion_text: The teacher processes students' understanding by asking clarifying or critical thinking questions related to the unit standards and competencies.

0.criterion_text: The students are active and engaged with the different learning tasks aimed at accomplishing the unit standards and competencies.

1.criterion_text: The students with the help of different learning materials and resources including technology achieve the learning goals of the unit standards and competencies.

2.criterion_text: The students with the help of different learning materials and resources including technology achieve the learning goals of the unit standards and competencies.

3.criterion_text: The students with the help of different learning materials and resources including technology achieve the learning goals of the unit standards and competencies.

4.criterion_text: The students are able to explain how their ideas, outputs or performances accomplish the unit standards and competencies.

5.criterion_text: The students, when encouraged or on their own, ask questions to clarify or deepen their understanding of the unit standards and competencies.

6.criterion_text: The students are able to relate or transfer their learning to daily life and real world situations.

7.criterion_text: The students are able to integrate 21st century skills in their achievement of the unit standards and competencies.

8.criterion_text: The students are able to reflect on and connect their learning with the school's PVMGO.
